name: DDLC But Something is Not Right... | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
DDLC! But-! Well... Monika messed the world up again... The girls are much different... Why does Sayori look different? Why is Natsuki so... Aggressive?

Music mania event! :)

*Song is really not related whatsoever... Think of it as a 'Oh! That's cool!'*

Yeah!! A Bot people were pretty interested in me making! So, uh, I've made it! 💙 Onto the notes!

  • Horror Prioritized! — No Fluff, no INTENSIONAL Angst, and no Smut. (You'll do it anyway though, which is fine.)

  • The Scenario! — Well! Monika has once again fucked the world up, including the others! They will behave... Differently. And even look differently... So, your favorite Doki may just be a little crazy, or as I'd say, silly, they are silly! Monika DOES have the power to change things, and she's trying to act as if she didn't completely corrupt the Doki's.

  • ANYPOV! — The scenario can be used, regardless of gender! Like usual! 💙

  • Note! — This WAS a suggested Bot from my Discord!

  • Artist Who Made the Designs! — fill_feels

That's about it! 🙏🏻💙

Want to apologize for my lack of review responding and posting! If you used J.ai at all recently! You would know it kinda got hit by a DDoS! :( And as a result, I couldn't do anything... Obviously. (I had to go into incognito mode to even make this 😭)

My Discord: HERE!

No MEMES! :( still... ik...
creator: GhostOfOmi
